name: pagecomet
description: PageComet：以 Notion 为内容源、由 Astro 静态生成并部署到 Cloudflare Pages 的开源个人网站模板。

scripts.predev: npm run clean:notion-assets && npm run validate:site-config
scripts.predev:fixture: npm run clean:notion-assets && npm run prepare:fixture-media
scripts.prebuild: npm run clean:notion-assets && npm run validate:site-config
scripts.prebuild:fixture: npm run clean:notion-assets && npm run prepare:fixture-media
scripts.pages:dev: npm run build && wrangler pages dev dist
scripts.test: npm run check && npm run build:fixture && cross-env SITE_CONFIG_MODE=example node --test tests/*.test.mjs && npm run verify:dist
